request: Rank the 4 best Audi R8 generations overall across the full production run. Use 4 different generations when available, with one representative version from each generation. If the model has fewer than 4 true generations, use the most important era-defining versions across its history.
title: RANKING THE BEST AUDI R8 GENERATIONS
close_narration: So, which R8 generation would you park in your garage?
order_rationale: Ordered from the earliest to the latest significant Audi R8 generations, highlighting their evolution and impact.

entries.name: First-Gen R8 V8
entries.label: THE ORIGINAL
entries.one_line_fact: Debuting in 2007 at $109,000, the first-gen R8 V8 packed 420 horsepower, setting the stage for Audi's supercar legacy. Today, clean examples trade around $61K.
entries.current_value_note: Recent Cars & Bids examples trade around $61K.
entries.narration: Debuting in 2007 at $109,000, the first-gen R8 V8 packed 420 horsepower, setting the stage for Audi's supercar legacy. Today, clean examples trade around $61K.

entries.name: First-Gen R8 GT
entries.label: TRACK-FOCUSED
entries.one_line_fact: In 2011, the R8 GT hit the scene with 560 horsepower and a $196,800 tag, shedding weight for ultimate track prowess. Today, clean examples trade around $100K.
entries.current_value_note: Recent Cars & Bids examples trade around $100K.
entries.narration: In 2011, the R8 GT hit the scene with 560 horsepower and a $196,800 tag, shedding weight for ultimate track prowess. Today, clean examples trade around $100K.

entries.name: Second-Gen R8 V10 Plus
entries.label: V10 POWERHOUSE
entries.one_line_fact: Launched in 2015, the R8 V10 Plus boasted 610 horsepower and a $189,900 price, redefining supercar performance. Today, clean examples trade around $260K.
entries.current_value_note: Recent Cars & Bids examples trade around $260K.
entries.narration: Launched in 2015, the R8 V10 Plus boasted 610 horsepower and a $189,900 price, redefining supercar performance. Today, clean examples trade around $260K.

entries.name: Second-Gen R8 GT
entries.label: FINAL EDITION
entries.one_line_fact: In 2023, the R8 GT bid farewell with 620 horsepower and a $208,000 price, marking the end of an era. Today, clean examples trade around $250K.
entries.current_value_note: Recent Cars & Bids examples trade around $250K.
entries.narration: In 2023, the R8 GT bid farewell with 620 horsepower and a $208,000 price, marking the end of an era. Today, clean examples trade around $250K.
